ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "coordinate_system" TEXT /* Coordinate system used by the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the attribute belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the dataset */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was shared */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
